description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular stereo sound system with a predominantly black exterior and a textured surface on one side. The front face features a metallic section with a sliding mechanism and a visible control dial marked with numbers, likely for tuning or volume adjustment. The top surface includes two recessed rectangular windows, possibly for display or speaker output, and a small metallic button or switch. The side panel is marked with the text 'КИЕВ-30', indicating a model or brand name. The overall design is minimalist, with a combination of matte and slightly glossy finishes, and the object appears to be constructed from metal and plastic. The back and bottom surfaces are plain, with no visible controls or openings.
description: A compact, black rectangular stereo sound system with a textured side, metallic sliding section, and visible control dial. Features include recessed windows on top and the label 'КИЕВ-30' on the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow face with a metallic section and a small rectangular window on top.
description_view_1: Side view displays the 'КИЕВ-30' label, textured black surface, and the metallic sliding section with a control dial.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the control dial with numeric markings and two rectangular windows on the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals a plain black surface and the metallic sliding section without any visible labels.
attribute_brand_logo: The side panel displays the text 'КИЕВ-30' in white, which appears to be the model or brand name.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single control dial with numeric markings is located on the metallic sliding section, accompanied by a small button or switch on the top surface.
